grim_example.description: Deals 5 damage. If this kills the target, inflicts 3 Weakness to all enemies for 3 turns.

stalking.name: Stalking
stalking.description: Deals 5 damage. Hits twice if the target has Weakness.

fear_feast.name: Fear Feast
fear_feast.description: Steals 2 Health from all enemies that have Weakness.

terror.name: Terror
terror.description: Inflicts 3 Weakness and Unretreatable to the target for 3 turns.

self_devour.name: Self-Devour
self_devour.description: Deals 1 damage to itself, then it regenerates 1 Health. Repeats 3 times.

kinetic_step.name: Kinetic Step
kinetic_step.description: Deals 4 damage. Gains 1 Swiftness. Amount increases by 1 after each use.

wild_sense.name: Wild Sense
wild_sense.description: Deals 10 damage. Usable only if it has at least 6 Swiftness.

supersonic_sweep.name: Supersonic Sweep
supersonic_sweep.description: Deals damage equal to its Swiftness to all enemies.

tempo.name: Tempo
tempo.description: Removes all its Swiftness. Regains 1 Health for each Swiftness removed.

critical_hunt.name: Critical Hunt
critical_hunt.description: Deals 8 damage. Dies if this move doesn't kill.

blood_ritual.name: Blood Ritual
blood_ritual.description: Deals 2 damage to itself. Gains 5 Strength.

bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
bloodlust.description: Deals 5 damage. Hits all lanes if a creature died this turn.

bloodbath.name: Bloodbath
bloodbath.description: Deals 5 damage. Deals 5 extra damage for each creature that died this turn
